message:
fix(messaging): three correctness bugs in Redis client

1. RESP decoder: add MAX_NESTING_DEPTH=64 to prevent stack overflow
   from maliciously nested arrays
2. SET with TTL: use PX (milliseconds) instead of EX (seconds) so
   sub-second durations don't truncate to zero and get rejected
3. PubSub ping: loop until PONG instead of expecting it as the next
   event, since subscription messages can interleave

Three regression tests added; all 45 redis tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
